chunks.title: The Remnant's Request
chunks.reason: The commanders and people approach Jeremiah to request a prayer for guidance.

chunks.title: Yahweh's Response and Warning
chunks.reason: Jeremiah delivers Yahweh's message offering two paths: staying in the land or going to Egypt.

chunks.title: The Remnant's Disobedience
chunks.reason: Jeremiah rebukes the people for leading themselves astray and reiterates their fate if they go to Egypt.
